_comment: Current claude.ai SPA asset manifest, captured from the live app via CDP (node ipc-mock/cdp.mjs). Lets the dev-server serve the SAME bundle the real desktop app loads, instead of the stale local ion-dist. Refresh when claude.ai redeploys: re-run the head-probe and update build/script/css.
